scenes.narration: Before merit cycle, comp teams need a full read on flagged pay issues — below minimum, compression, pay equity, location pay, and range position. ShiftWorks HR turns one roster upload into a complete compensation review in about a minute.
Pull an export from your HRIS — Workday, ADP, UKG — or build your own spreadsheet. Drop that file into ShiftWorks HR and your columns map automatically. No IT project needed.
You get a full cycle-readiness view — flagged issues, budget exposure, compa-ratio gaps, and everything that could hold up merit before letters go out.
Drill into flagged employees with names, departments, and exact dollar gaps — below minimum, compression, and more — so you know what needs fixing.
ShiftWorks flags manager inversions too — when someone earns less than the people they manage, you see both names and salaries side by side.
Gender and race median pay gaps are built in by group, using the demographic columns already in your export.
If your file has a location or city column, ShiftWorks compares median pay across geographies and shows how headcount is distributed — no separate spreadsheet or model.
When leadership wants a summary, one export gives you a PDF with risk level, total exposure, and the findings they'll press you on.
Try it free at shiftworkshr.com with your own roster. No credit card required.
